---
title: "NHIS 2021 Data Analysis"
author: |
  Alyssa Bautista 
  Grant Pasamonte 
  Jamie Rosas Jr
  Group 7
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(psych)

nhis_clean <- read_csv("data/nhis_clean.csv")
```

# Introduction


# Methods


# Results


# Discussion


# Conclusion
